title: fix: sanitize tool schemas with allowlist for Vertex AI compatibility
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: Clean schemas, happy models
gist.blurb: We've updated how we handle tool schemas for Vertex AI, switching to a strict allowlist. Now your function calling requests will pass through smoothly without tripping over unsupported properties.
gist.summary: Switched tool schema sanitization to an allowlist approach to ensure compatibility with Vertex AI models.
gist.impact: Developers using function calling with Gemini/Vertex AI will no longer encounter errors from unsupported JSON schema properties like patternProperties.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about cleaning/sanitizing data (tool schemas) to make it acceptable for Vertex AI (Gemini). Visual metaphor: The Nomnom creature eating bad/unsupported code blocks while the bee holds a clean, filtered list.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the round tan Nomnom creature happily eating messy, red-tinted code blocks, while the cute bee mascot stands nearby wearing tiny wizard glasses and holding a glowing lime green (#ecf874) clipboard with a clean checklist. Soft pastel lavender and cream gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
